questions.question: In PHP, the ________ operator is used to concatenate two strings together.
The ________ statement in PHP is used to execute a block of code repeatedly as long as a specified condition is true.
In PHP, the ________ function is used to split a string into an array based on a delimiter.
A ________ array in PHP is an array where each element is associated with a key that is a string, rather than an index number.
In PHP, the ________ function is used to convert a string to all uppercase letters.
In PHP, a ________ method is automatically called when an object is created.
________ in PHP allows a child class to inherit methods and properties from a parent class.
In PHP, to connect to a MySQL database, you use the ________ function.
